heading: Application of other provisions
label: 5376 Application of other provisions
text: Section 314 of the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1991 (; ), shall apply to compacts and funding agreements entered into under this subchapter.Public Law 101–512104 Stat. 1959
notes: References in TextSection 314 of the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1991, referred to in text, is , which is set out as a note under .section 314 of Pub. L. 101–512section 5321 of this title
